title: Soil And Water Management Alternatives For Increased Productivity On SAT Alfisols
abstract:
Alfisols are agriculturally important soils throughout
much of the semi-arid tropics (SAT) in spite of
serious physical and chemical limitations. They are
the t h i r d most important soil order in the world, covering
13.1% of the world area (Buringh, 1982) and a r e
the most abundant s o i l s i n t h e SAT, cover nearly 16%
of the tropics and 33% of the SAT region.
